sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21028" key="brontei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βροντ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n21028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">engine for making stage-thunder</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
